title: Extension of Tenure of High Level Committee or Corporate Social Responsibility -2018
description: Extension of Tenure of High Level Committee or Corporate Social Responsibility -2018
text: General Circular No. 02/2019 F. NO.12/03/2018-CSR Government of India Ministry of Corporate Affairs 5th Floor, A-Wing, Shastri Bhawan Dr. Rajendra Prasad Road, New Delhi-110001. Dated: 08.03.2019 CIRCULAR Subject: Extension of Tenure of High Level Committee on Corporate Social Responsibility - 2 0 1 8 - reg. The High Level Committee on Corporate Social Responsibility, 2018 was constituted under the Chairmanship of Secretary, Ministry of Corporate Affairs vide OM of even no. dated 22.11.2018 to review the existing framework and formulate a coherent policy on Corporate Social Responsibility. The Committee has been granted extension of three months with effect from 04.03.2019 with the approval of Hon'ble Union Minister for Corporate Affairs to submit its report. 2. This issues with the approval of Hon'ble Union Minister for Corporate Affairs. (Aparna Mudiam) Deputy Director To, 1. DG, Indian Institute of Corporate Affairs 2. Chairman, SEBI 3. Dr. Anoop Kumar Mittal, CMD, NBCC 4. Mr. N. Chandrasekharan, Chairman Tata Sons 5. Mr. Amit Chandra, MD, Bain Capital Private Equity 6. Mr. P S Narasimha, Additional Solicitor General 7. Mr. Rajiv K. Luthra, Founder & MD Luthra & Luthra Law Offices Ms. Shobana Kamineni, Executive Vice Chairperson, Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Limited 9. Prof. Anil K Gupta, Founder Honey Bee Network & Prof. IIM-A 10. Dr. Narinder Dhruv Batra, President, Indian Olympic Association 11. Mr. S. Santhanakrishnan, CA & Consultant 12. Mr. Mathew Cherian, CEO Helpage India Copy for information to: (i) PS to Hon'ble Minister of Corporate Affairs. (ii) PPS to Secretary, MCA. (iii) PStoJS(AA)/JS(K)/JS(G) (iv) All Regional Directors/ Registrar of Companies, MCA (By email only). -- 1 of 1 --
